test-method.name: testAppLaunchDisplaysScreen
test-method.description: TC01 - App launches and opening screen is displayed

test-method.name: testLoginWithMobileAndOtp
test-method.description: TC02 - Login with mobile 6351738122 and OTP 123456

exception.message: Should have navigated away from OTP screen after successful login expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Should have navigated away from OTP screen after successful login expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
